SEARCH
Package grafioschtrader.entities

Class StandingOrderSecurity

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafiosch.entities.TenantBaseID
grafioschtrader.entities.StandingOrder
grafioschtrader.entities.StandingOrderSecurity
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Entity public class StandingOrderSecurity extends StandingOrder
Concrete standing order subclass for security transactions (ACCUMULATE and REDUCE). Supports two mutually exclusive purchasing modes:
  • Unit-based: units is set, investAmount is null — buys/sells a fixed number of units
  • Amount-based: investAmount is set, units is null — invests a fixed cash amount, units are calculated at execution time from the current price
Maps to the standing_order_security join table in the JOINED inheritance hierarchy.
See Also:
